query:

SET
  awayModelSpread = NULL,
  homeModelSpread = NULL,
  modelTotal = NULL,
  spreadEdge = NULL,
  spreadDiff = NULL,
  totalEdge = NULL,
  totalDiff = NULL,
  modelAwayML = NULL,
  modelHomeML = NULL
WHERE sport = 'NBA';
